name: Contact USA
description_short: Founded in 1993, Contact USA claims to be America's oldest credit repair company, offering dispute services and credit monitoring across all 50 states.
description_long:
Contact USA is a New York-based credit repair company that has operated continuously since 1993, giving it over three decades in the industry. The company markets itself as 'America's Oldest Credit Repair Company' and reports having removed more than 35,000 negative entries from clients' credit reports over its history. Operating under the tagline 'Walk Away from Bad Credit™,' it serves clients in all 50 states and maintains contact numbers in the New York metro area across Brooklyn (718), Manhattan (212), and Rockland County (845).

The company offers three core service lines. First, it requests credit reports from all three major bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — and provides a free initial consultation to assess a client's situation. Second, it performs credit restoration work targeting the removal of late payments, collections, charge-offs, foreclosures, judgments, and liens from credit reports, with the company claiming results in 'months, not years.' Third, it provides a credit monitoring service that delivers a complete credit profile from all three bureaus three times per year, with derogatory items flagged. The site also hosts a resource library including the full text of the FCRA, CROA, and FDCPA, articles on bankruptcy, debt settlement, and debt consolidation, plus a suite of seven financial calculators.

Contact USA's primary stated differentiator is longevity — a 1993 founding predates most competitors in the credit repair space. The site includes a 'Credit Repair Myths' section and links to federal statutes, signaling an intent to position the company as an educational resource. The website also cross-promotes credit card affiliate products from Amazon, Chime, Mission Lane, Capital One, and American Express alongside its repair services, indicating a hybrid service-plus-affiliate revenue model.

The website discloses no pricing, no fee structure, and no sample contract language — a significant omission given that the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) mandates written contracts with full disclosures before any payment is collected. The site design is visibly dated and includes a 'Currently Online: 3415 Users' counter that appears static, which may reduce consumer confidence. Prospective clients should request the required CROA disclosure contract upfront and verify cost structures before engaging. As with all credit repair services, only inaccurate or unverifiable items can legally be removed — legitimate debts reported correctly cannot be erased regardless of the company used.
pros: Founded 1993 — claims to be America's oldest credit repair company with 33 years of continuous operation
Reports over 35,000 negative entries successfully removed across client history
Licensed to service clients in all 50 states
Free initial consultation with no obligation to proceed
Credit monitoring service delivers full 3-bureau credit profile three times per year
Provides the full text of FCRA, CROA, and FDCPA on-site for consumer education
Seven free financial calculators covering mortgages, loans, and debt consolidation
cons: No pricing or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website — a red flag under CROA requirements
No mention of BBB accreditation, state licensing details, or third-party review verification
Website design and features (static 'online users' counter, dated layout) suggest limited operational transparency
Credit monitoring is only 3 times per year — competitors offer continuous real-time alerts
No explanation of dispute methodology, success rates by item type, or what happens if disputes fail
best_for: Consumers with multiple derogatory items (collections, charge-offs, judgments) seeking experienced dispute representation
New York metro-area clients who prefer a local firm with a long track record
People who want access to federal credit law resources and financial education alongside repair services
Clients comfortable with a consultation-first model who want a human-led approach rather than software automation
diagnosis: Contact USA is best suited for consumers with several inaccurate or disputable negative items who want a long-tenured firm to manage the bureau dispute process on their behalf. The main caveat is the complete absence of pricing transparency on the website — prospective clients must request a written CROA contract before signing anything, and should confirm costs explicitly before proceeding.
services: Credit report retrieval from all three major bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Late payment removal from credit reports
Credit monitoring service (3 full bureau reports per year)
Credit laws reference library (FCRA, CROA, FDCPA)
Educational articles on bankruptcy, debt settlement, and debt consolidation
Financial calculators (loan, interest, mortgage, amortization, debt consolidation, bi-weekly mortgage, payoff goal)
Downloadable forms and client document portal
